title: Minimum Recolors to Get K Consecutive Black Blocks
titleCn: 得到 K 个黑块的最少涂色次数

testcases.input: blocks = "WBBWWBBWBW", k = 7 Output: 3 Explanation: One way to achieve 7 consecutive black blocks is to recolor the 0th, 3rd, and 4th blocks so that blocks = "BBBBBBBWBW". It can be shown that there is no way to achieve 7 consecutive black blocks in less than 3 operations. Therefore, we return 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: One way to achieve 7 consecutive black blocks is to recolor the 0th, 3rd, and 4th blocks so that blocks = "BBBBBBBWBW". It can be shown that there is no way to achieve 7 consecutive black blocks in less than 3 operations. Therefore, we return 3.

testcases.input: blocks = "WBWBBBW", k = 2 Output: 0 Explanation: No changes need to be made, since 2 consecutive black blocks already exist. Therefore, we return 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: No changes need to be made, since 2 consecutive black blocks already exist. Therefore, we return 0.
